subject: fix(ui): remove maxWidth cap on search button so it fills available space
body:
Search is the primary user action — it should visually dominate the header.
The 200px cap forced it to the same size as the filter buttons on wider screens.
Now flex: 1 lets it take all remaining space, with filters staying compact.

Tags: ui, layout, header
Complexity: 1
Urgency: 3
Impact: user-facing
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: header-layout
Semver: patch
